lines.gurmukhi: ਮੋਹਿ ਰੈਣਿ ਨ ਵਿਹਾਵੈ ਨੀਦ ਨ ਆਵੈ ਬਿਨੁ ਦੇਖੇ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਬਾਰੇ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: mohi rain na vihaavai need na aavai bin dekhe gur darabaare jeeo |3|
lines.english: I cannot endure the night, and sleep does not come, without the Sight of the Beloved Guru's Court. ||3||

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਘੋਲੀ ਜੀਉ ਘੋਲਿ ਘੁਮਾਈ ਤਿਸੁ ਸਚੇ ਗੁਰ ਦਰਬਾਰੇ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥
lines.translit: hau gholee jeeo ghol ghumaaee tis sache gur darabaare jeeo |1| rahaau |
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice, to that True Court of the Beloved Guru. ||1||Pause||
By good fortune, I have met the Saint Guru.
I have found the Immortal Lord within the home of my own self.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੇਵ ਕਰੀ ਪਲੁ ਚਸਾ ਨ ਵਿਛੁੜਾ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਤੁਮਾਰੇ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥
lines.translit: sev karee pal chasaa na vichhurraa jan naanak daas tumaare jeeo |4|
lines.english: I will now serve You forever, and I shall never be separated from You, even for an instant. Servant Nanak is Your slave, O Beloved Master. ||4||
Raag Maajh, Fifth Mehl:

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਘੋਲੀ ਜੀਉ ਘੋਲਿ ਘੁਮਾਈ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਤੁਮਾਰੇ ਜੀਉ ॥ ਰਹਾਉ ॥੧॥੮॥
lines.translit: hau gholee jeeo ghol ghumaaee jan naanak daas tumaare jeeo | rahaau |1|8|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice, my soul is a sacrifice; servant Nanak is Your slave, Lord. ||Pause||1||8||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਰੁਤਿ ਸੁਹਾਵੀ ਜਿਤੁ ਤੁਧੁ ਸਮਾਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: saa rut suhaavee jit tudh samaalee |
lines.english: Sweet is that season when I remember You.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਰਿਦਾ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ਜਿਤੁ ਰਿਦੈ ਤੂੰ ਵੁਠਾ ਸਭਨਾ ਕੇ ਦਾਤਾਰਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: so ridaa suhelaa jit ridai toon vutthaa sabhanaa ke daataaraa jeeo |1|
lines.english: Blessed is that heart in which You dwell, O Giver of all. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋ ਕੰਮੁ ਸੁਹੇਲਾ ਜੋ ਤੇਰੀ ਘਾਲੀ ॥
lines.translit: so kam suhelaa jo teree ghaalee |
lines.english: Sublime is that work which is done for You.
You are the Universal Father of all, O my Lord and Master.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਤੂੰ ਦੇਹਿ ਸੁ ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਵੈ ਸੋਈ ਭਗਤੁ ਤੁਮਾਰਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: jis toon dehi su tripat aghaavai soee bhagat tumaaraa jeeo |2|
lines.english: Those unto whom You give are satisfied and fulfilled; they become Your devotees, Lord. ||2||
Your nine treasures are an inexhaustible storehouse.
All place their hopes in You.
You dwell deep within each and every heart.
You Yourself liberate the Gurmukhs;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਭੇ ਸਾਝੀਵਾਲ ਸਦਾਇਨਿ ਤੂੰ ਕਿਸੈ ਨ ਦਿਸਹਿ ਬਾਹਰਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: sabhe saajheevaal sadaaein toon kisai na diseh baaharaa jeeo |3|
lines.english: All share in Your Grace; none are beyond You. ||3||
You Yourself consign the self-willed manmukhs to wander in reincarnation.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਦਾਸ ਤੇਰੈ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੈ ਸਭੁ ਤੇਰਾ ਖੇਲੁ ਦਸਾਹਰਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੨॥੯॥
lines.translit: naanak daas terai balihaarai sabh teraa khel dasaaharaa jeeo |4|2|9|
lines.english: Slave Nanak is a sacrifice to You; Your Entire Play is self-evident, Lord. ||4||2||9||
The Unstruck Melody resounds and resonates in peaceful ease.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਹਜ ਗੁਫਾ ਮਹਿ ਤਾੜੀ ਲਾਈ ਆਸਣੁ ਊਚ ਸਵਾਰਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: sehaj gufaa meh taarree laaee aasan aooch savaariaa jeeo |1|
lines.english: In the cave of intuitive wisdom I sit, absorbed in the silent trance of the Primal Void. I have obtained my seat in the heavens. ||1||
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
I rejoice in the eternal bliss of the Word of the Shabad.
and I have found what I was longing for.

lines.gurmukhi: ਫਿਰਿ ਘਿਰਿ ਅਪੁਨੇ ਗ੍ਰਿਹ ਮਹਿ ਆਇਆ ॥
lines.translit: fir ghir apune grih meh aaeaa |
lines.english: After wandering through many other homes and houses, I have returned to my own home,
He Himself is the King, and He Himself is the people.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤ੍ਰਿਪਤਿ ਅਘਾਇ ਰਹਿਆ ਹੈ ਸੰਤਹੁ ਗੁਰਿ ਅਨਭਉ ਪੁਰਖੁ ਦਿਖਾਰਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: tripat aghaae rahiaa hai santahu gur anbhau purakh dikhaariaa jeeo |2|
lines.english: I am satisfied and fulfilled; O Saints, the Guru has shown me the Fearless Lord God. ||2||

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਪੇ ਤਖਤਿ ਬਹੈ ਸਚੁ ਨਿਆਈ ਸਭ ਚੂਕੀ ਕੂਕ ਪੁਕਾਰਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: aape takhat bahai sach niaaee sabh chookee kook pukaariaa jeeo |3|
lines.english: He Himself sits on the throne of true justice, answering the cries and prayers of all. ||3||
He Himself is in Nirvaanaa, and He Himself indulges in pleasures.

lines.gurmukhi: ਤਿਸੁ ਰਸੁ ਆਇਆ ਜਿਨਿ ਭੇਦੁ ਲਹਿਆ ॥
lines.translit: tis ras aaeaa jin bhed lahiaa |
lines.english: This Sublime Essence comes only to one who knows the Mystery of the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋਤੀ ਜੋਤਿ ਮਿਲੀ ਸੁਖੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਜਨ ਨਾਨਕ ਇਕੁ ਪਸਾਰਿਆ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੩॥੧੦॥
lines.translit: jotee jot milee sukh paaeaa jan naanak ik pasaariaa jeeo |4|3|10|
lines.english: His light merges into the Light, and he finds peace. O servant Nanak, this is all the Extension of the One. ||4||3||10||
As I have seen Him, so have I described Him.
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
That house, in which the soul-bride has married her Husband Lord
in that house, O my companions, sing the songs of rejoicing.

lines.gurmukhi: ਅਨਦ ਬਿਨੋਦ ਤਿਤੈ ਘਰਿ ਸੋਹਹਿ ਜੋ ਧਨ ਕੰਤਿ ਸਿਗਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: anad binod titai ghar soheh jo dhan kant sigaaree jeeo |1|
lines.english: Joy and celebrations decorate that house, in which the Husband Lord has adorned His soul-bride. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਰੂਪਵੰਤਿ ਸਾ ਸੁਘੜਿ ਬਿਚਖਣਿ ਜੋ ਧਨ ਕੰਤ ਪਿਆਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: roopavant saa sugharr bichakhan jo dhan kant piaaree jeeo |2|
lines.english: She is beautiful, wise, and clever. That soul-bride is the beloved of her Husband Lord. ||2||
she is blessed with sons and tender-hearted. The happy soul-bride is loved by her Husband.
She is virtuous, and she is very fortunate;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾ ਕੁਲਵੰਤੀ ਸਾ ਸਭਰਾਈ ਜੋ ਪਿਰਿ ਕੈ ਰੰਗਿ ਸਵਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: saa kulavantee saa sabharaaee jo pir kai rang savaaree jeeo |3|
lines.english: She is from a most respected family; she is the queen, adorned with the Love of her Husband Lord. ||3||
She is well-mannered, noble and distinguished.
She is decorated and adorned with wisdom.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜੋ ਪਿਰਿ ਮੇਲਿ ਲਈ ਅੰਗਿ ਲਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: jo pir mel lee ang laae |
lines.english: she melts in the Embrace of her Husband Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਮਹਿਮਾ ਤਿਸ ਕੀ ਕਹਣੁ ਨ ਜਾਏ ॥
lines.translit: mahimaa tis kee kehan na jaae |
lines.english: Her glory cannot be described;
